host.label: TV IP Address
host.help: e.g. 192.168.1.105 — assign a static IP in your router (DHCP reservation)

macAddress.label: MAC Address (for Wake-on-LAN)
macAddress.help: Required to turn on TV over network. Find it in TV Settings → Network → Advanced. Format: AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF

reconnectInterval.label: Reconnect interval (seconds)
reconnectInterval.help: Time to wait after losing connection before retrying

mqttEnabled.label: Enable MQTT client
mqttEnabled.help: Publish TV states to an MQTT broker and receive commands from it

mqttHost.label: MQTT Broker Host
mqttHost.help: IP address or hostname of the MQTT broker (e.g. 192.168.1.10 or localhost)

mqttTopic.label: Topic prefix
mqttTopic.help: Base topic for all states. States are published as {prefix}/state/NAME, commands received on {prefix}/set/NAME
